message:
Close all edge case gaps in risk classification

Add subshell unwrapping:
- Extract inner command from bash/sh/zsh/ksh/dash -c 'command'
- Recursive normalization of extracted commands

Add xargs pipeline analysis:
- ExtractXargsCommand extracts command from xargs invocations
- classifyCompoundCommand now analyzes xargs targets
- Add ^rm$ pattern to catch bare rm in xargs pipelines

Edge case coverage improved from 6/9 to 9/9:
- Case variations (RM -RF, Rm -rF)
- Whitespace variations (extra spaces, tabs)
- Quoted paths ('path', "path")
- Subshells (bash -c '...')
- Pipelines (find | xargs rm)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
